name: claude-review
description: Review working changes, branches, commits, ranges, or repositories with Claude from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent, scoped code reviews with Claude.
interface.longDescription: Ask Claude to review exact Git scopes from Codex, keep context across re-reviews, and preserve inspectable local artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Review my current working changes with Claude.
Ask Claude to review this branch against main.
Show the latest Claude review result.
